commit_scope: Add a Hostinger API-native deploy carrier that avoids GitHub-runner SSH/SCP by deploying the existing Docker project through Hostinger's Docker API.

local_validation.notes: The focused test proves the deploy request reads existing Hostinger project content/environment, preserves provider-side environment values, rewrites build contexts to an immutable Git SHA, adds the web DEPLOYED_SHA build arg, and posts to the Hostinger Docker API without SSH/SCP.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Current public production remains at deployed_sha 5dad3d6f0d7f48495b9644fde0e8d26572962ae1. Hostinger Auto Deploy run 26894162844 for 70cbbec4314c7b8845596e661869b8d9ed478402 failed before roll-forward at GitHub-runner SSH/SCP to root@187.77.152.42. The new API-native deploy carrier is not yet merged or executed against production.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: After merge, the manual Hostinger API Native Deploy workflow can deploy the current SHA through Hostinger's Docker project API using the source-owned Dockerfile.web and Git SHA build contexts, avoiding the failing inbound SSH transport.
test_flows: After merge: gh workflow run hostinger-api-native-deploy.yml --repo seeker71/Coherence-Network -r main -f sha=<main-sha>

phase_gate.reason: The API-native carrier is locally proven but still needs PR merge and a live Hostinger API deployment run before production SHA parity is restored.

evidence_refs: scripts/hostinger_api_native_deploy.sh reads the live Hostinger project, transforms only source build contexts, updates SHA values in provider environment, and posts back through /api/vps/v1/virtual-machines/{id}/docker.
scripts/test_hostinger_api_native_deploy.sh proves the generated request preserves provider environment values and targets Git SHA contexts.
Dockerfile.web makes the web image build source-owned and bakes deployed_sha into api/config/api.json for web health-proxy SHA parity.
Local Docker daemon was unavailable, so Docker image build proof is deferred to the Hostinger API Native Deploy workflow.
